title: Pack Samples
description: Schema for sap-devs samples.yaml files (top-level array)

id.description: Sample identifier in format <pack-id>/<slug>, e.g. cap/cat-service-handler

url.description: Full URL to the sample file (typically a GitHub file URL)

tags.description: Filtering tags for discovery (e.g. cap, node, handler)

inject.description: If true, included in the AI context injection as a canonical pattern
